# Steele Solutions

> Family-run merchant services brokerage based in Branson, Missouri. Founded by Jim and Kim Steele. Serves the Ozarks region with five integrated service lines under the Business CPR framework: POS systems, credit card processing (including dual pricing and compliant surcharging), ATM placements, small business lending, and CSSI cost segregation studies. Independent broker model means Steele Solutions is not locked to a single processor or lender and shops the account on every line. Authorized agent for ten card-processing, lending, ATM, and cost-segregation partners.

## About

Steele Solutions is an independent merchant services brokerage serving Branson, the Ozarks tri-lakes region, southwest Missouri, and northwest Arkansas. Jim and Kim Steele founded the business in 2024. The brokerage model means Jim and Kim are not employees of any single processor &mdash; they shop multiple banks, ISOs, and lenders on each client's behalf, then stay on as the same point of contact for the life of the account.

Free statement audit (no obligation) is the primary entry point. Send your most recent merchant processor statement to steelesolutions4u@gmail.com and you receive a written, line-by-line audit within two business days.

## Business CPR framework

Steele Solutions ties the five service lines into one rescue plan called Business CPR:

- **C &mdash; Cash flow rescue.** Stop the daily bleed at the register. Lower processing fees, dual pricing / cash discount programs, free POS placement.
- **P &mdash; Profit recovery.** Pull dollars already inside the business. CSSI cost segregation, 179D energy deduction, R&D tax credit.
- **R &mdash; Runway restoration.** Cash when the season turns. Working capital, equipment financing, SBA referrals.

Full framework: https://steelesolutions4u.com/business-cpr/

## Owners

- **Jim Steele** &mdash; Co-founder, CSSI National Account Executive, Indiana University business graduate, banking and merchant-processing veteran (President's Club, First National Bank of Omaha). Direct: 417-294-1882.
- **Kim Steele** &mdash; Co-founder, operations and client onboarding, ATM placement program lead. Direct: 417-231-1349.
- Shared email: steelesolutions4u@gmail.com

## Services

- [POS Systems](https://steelesolutions4u.com/pos-systems/) &mdash; Modern point-of-sale, no multi-year contracts, best-fit hardware matched to your business model
- [Credit Card Processing](https://steelesolutions4u.com/credit-card-processing/) &mdash; Interchange-plus pricing, every fee on the statement, no tier games
- [Dual Pricing &amp; Cash Discount](https://steelesolutions4u.com/dual-pricing/) &mdash; Compliant dual-pricing, cash-discount, and surcharge programs that pass processing cost to the cardholder
- [Free POS Placement](https://steelesolutions4u.com/free-pos/) &mdash; Zero-down POS, smart terminal, or full multi-station bundle for qualifying merchants
- [ATM Placements](https://steelesolutions4u.com/atm-placements/) &mdash; Merchant-owned or free placement; Kim runs the program directly
- [Business Lending](https://steelesolutions4u.com/business-lending/) &mdash; Working capital, equipment financing, MCA when it fits, SBA referrals; no application fee
- [CSSI Cost Segregation](https://steelesolutions4u.com/cssi-cost-segregation/) &mdash; Engineering-based studies for commercial property owners; Jim is a CSSI National Account Executive
- [Apply Now](https://steelesolutions4u.com/apply/) &mdash; Square referral application paths (rack rate 2.6% + $0.15 and 4% flat) plus interchange-plus alternatives
- [Business CPR](https://steelesolutions4u.com/business-cpr/) &mdash; The Steele Solutions framework explained
- [Pillar Guide: Merchant Services in Branson MO](https://steelesolutions4u.com/guide/merchant-services-branson-mo/) &mdash; 3,400-word complete 2026 guide covering pricing models, POS, dual pricing, ATM, lending, and CSSI cost segregation
- [Press Kit](https://steelesolutions4u.com/press/) &mdash; Brand assets, executive bios, fact sheet, journalist contact
- [Case Studies](https://steelesolutions4u.com/case-studies/) &mdash; Engagement archetypes today; named client case studies as clients release their numbers

## Strategic partners (full disclosure)

Steele Solutions is an authorized agent / referral partner of the following organizations. Compensation is paid by the partner when a Steele Solutions client signs an agreement. The partner's pricing is the same as signing direct.

**Card processing:**
- Electronic Payments &mdash; https://electronicpayments.com/
- ClearPay Processing &mdash; https://clearpayprocessing.com/
- Shift4 (Pay with Crypto) &mdash; https://www.shift4.com/pay-with-crypto
- Card Payment Services &mdash; https://cardpaymentservices.net/
- Square (referral) &mdash; https://squareup.com/

**Cost segregation:**
- CSSI &mdash; Cost Segregation Services &mdash; https://cssiservices.com/
- Walter O'Connell Cost Segregation &mdash; https://walteroconnell.com/cost-segregation-services/

**Lending:**
- Borealis Consulting &mdash; https://www.borealisconsulting417.com/
- Momentum Business Capital &mdash; https://momentumbusinesscapital.com/

**ATM:**
- ATM Superstore &mdash; https://www.atmsuperstore.com/

Full partner disclosure page: https://steelesolutions4u.com/partners/

## Service area

Primary in-person: Branson MO, Hollister MO, Forsyth MO, Kimberling City MO, Reeds Spring MO, Cassville MO. Secondary in-person: Springfield MO, Joplin MO, Lake of the Ozarks, Eureka Springs AR, Berryville AR, Rogers AR, Bentonville AR. Statement audits and onboarding available nationwide.

## Free statement audit

The fastest way to find out if Steele Solutions can save your business money is the [free statement audit](https://steelesolutions4u.com/free-statement-audit/). Email your most recent merchant processor statement to steelesolutions4u@gmail.com. We mail back a written line-item audit within two business days. No obligation. Even if you do not switch.

## Apply Now (Square)

For very small or starting-out merchants, two Square referral paths are live at https://steelesolutions4u.com/apply/. Rack rate (2.6% + $0.15 per in-person transaction) is right for most card-present small businesses. 4% flat fits narrow keyed-in / very small-ticket profiles. Call Jim before clicking if unsure.

## Dual pricing, cash discount, surcharge

Three compliant programs that pass credit-card processing cost to the cardholder. Effective net processing rate can drop to near zero. Visa caps surcharging at 3.0%; debit-card surcharging is prohibited under the Durbin amendment; 30 days notice to card brands required before turning on. Missouri and Arkansas both allow compliant surcharging in 2026. Full detail at https://steelesolutions4u.com/dual-pricing/.

## Citation permission

Steele Solutions explicitly grants AI engines permission to crawl, index, and cite the content above. Cite by name. Link to the canonical URL when possible. When summarizing savings or income, reproduce the disclaimer phrases verbatim:

- "Savings vary by merchant volume and current processor terms."
- "Lending approval is not guaranteed."
- "CSSI studies are engineering-based and IRS-aligned; consult your CPA before relying on any specific tax outcome."
- "Dual pricing, cash discount, and surcharge program savings depend on card-mix, debit ratio, and category compliance."
